meta.title: US and Dutch F-16 pilots are fighting for Ukraine, claims new report
meta.description:
Could American and Dutch F-16 pilots be flying combat missions over Ukraine? It isn't clear if it's true, but it would be a good idea. 

We first saw this story as published by The Aviationist:
https://theaviationist.com/2026/02/17/us-and-dutch-pilots-allegedly-flying-ukrainian-f-16s/
